title: memecylon intermedium
intro: Memecylon intermedium, also known as the intermediate memecylon, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to Sri Lanka and India. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Memecylon intermedium include its potential use in treating various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, and its herbal preparations include decoctions, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat these conditions.
